answers: Fencing = Olympic sword fighting with 3 weapons: foil (light, torso target), epee (heavy, full body), sabre (cutting, upper body).
Start: find a local fencing club, take beginner classes. Clubs provide equipment for beginners.
Benefits: great footwork and reflexes, strategic thinking (physical chess), and unique sport that stands out on college apps.
Fencing basics: learn en garde position, advance/retreat footwork, simple attack, and parry-riposte defense.
